channel.title: Posts on My Kata Life
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My Kata Life

item.title: Karate: Green Belt!
item.description: I’ve now reached Green Belt!

item.title: Karate: Orange Belt!
item.description: I’ve now reached Orange Belt! On to Green!

item.title: Martial Arts Figures: Joe Lewis
item.description: Joe Lewis (1944–2012) was a legendary American martial artist, kickboxer, and actor, widely regarded as one of the greatest fighters in martial arts history. Let’s break down his story!

item.title: Karate: Orange Belt Martial Arts History
item.description: As we work our way from Yellow Belt to Orange Belt we are given some more things to learn. This time more about martial arts in general. Here are some of the things learned.

item.title: Karate: Yellow Belt!
item.description: I’ve now reached Yellow Belt! I’m back to where I started 14 years ago!

item.title: Karate: Yellow Belt Terms and Basic History
item.description: During the course of working from White belt to Yellow belt we are given a series of Basic Terms and History to introduce them into Karate. I took some of those questions and dug a bit deeper.

item.title: My Journey Begins
item.description:
I’ve always been a fan of Martial arts. When I was a kid I wanted to start classes, but it never worked out for a number of reasons.

In college I finally had my first opportunity! I needed 1 PE credit for my degree and while looking through the course catalog and I found it. A karate class offered by Grand Master Chan Yu.
